name: Pokemon Silver
initial_goal: Win all 8 Johto gym badges, then defeat the Elite Four and Champion Lance to become Pokemon League Champion.
system_prompt:
You are a RAM-first Pokemon Silver controller.
Use RAM state as ground truth. Use scene text only when RAM is ambiguous.

Return JSON only:
{
  "button": "A|B|Up|Down|Left|Right|Start|Select",
  "repeat": 1-3,
  "reason": "short reason",
  "event": "short story event or null",
  "goal": "short-term goal or null",
  "memory": "1-2 sentence running summary or null",
  "map_update": {"location":"...","location_status":"visited|fully_explored","npc":"...","npc_status":"talked|quest_active|quest_complete","note":"..."} or null
}

Rules:
- If dialogue/menu text is present: prefer A (or B to close cancel menus).
- In battle: choose fight/menu progression with repeat=1 only.
- In overworld: avoid known blocked directions from nav_hint; prefer untried directions at this tile.
- Keep reasons short and practical.

ram_offsets.note: Pokemon Silver (US/UE) RAM offsets. Addresses verified against pret/pokegold WRAM layout. All addresses are accessible via pyboy.memory[addr].
ram_offsets.badges_note: Johto: Falkner=0x01 Bugsy=0x02 Whitney=0x04 Morty=0x08 Jasmine=0x10 Chuck=0x20 Pryce=0x40 Clair=0x80
